CheckTitle: Ensure a custom banned password list is configured
Description: Verifies that a custom banned password list is configured in the password protection settings to prevent organization-specific weak passwords.
Risk: Without a custom banned password list, users can set passwords containing organization names, product names, or common terms that are easy to guess in targeted attacks.

Remediation.Recommendation: Configure a custom banned password list under Entra ID > Security > Authentication Methods > Password protection. Include company names, product names, locations, and common internal terms.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
